title: Analysis: Hungary's Populist Legacy After Orbán's Defeat
detail: International media begins analyzing the broader implications of Viktor Orbán's electoral defeat for populist movements across Europe. The analysis examines how Hungary's democratic transition under new leadership could impact EU cohesion, NATO unity, and the country's relationship with international financial institutions like the IMF. Experts are assessing whether Orbán's 16-year populist experiment will have lasting effects on Hungarian institutions and political culture.

media.caption: Analysis of Hungary's political transition following Orbán's defeat
